fitted_k_diel_active_window.note: active = fitted diel kernel log-rate contribution > 0 (mean-centered)

temperature_survey.s3_water_temperature_stream: NONE (no dedicated SST/water_temperature stream; WTMP only inside noaa_ndbc_stdmet)

ingested_ndbc_stdmet.role_in_fit: detectability/noise metadata; not a fitted animal kernel

ndbc_46088_historical_wtmp.station: 46088 New Dungeness (~48.33N,123.17W, E Strait of Juan de Fuca)

role_classification.methodology_default_B2: Level-0 detectability/effort term (weather/temperature), NOT an animal kernel
role_classification.as_L0_detectability_effort: defensible but weak/redundant: ambient noise + sea state (WSPD/WVHT, already ingested) dominate acoustic QC; temperature is a minor collinear addition. L0 detector already PASSES (ROC AUC 0.879).
role_classification.as_animal_effect_modifier_s_space_k_salm: NOT defensible on this data: Salish-Sea SST over 2020-2026 is ~f(day-of-year), collinear with k_season (already withheld, no skill) and the prey pathway is already represented by k_salmon. Not separately identifiable from season.
role_classification.verdict: primarily L0 detectability/effort; NOT a standalone animal kernel without independent skill-beyond-season justification

temperature_survey.go_no_go: data availability GREEN (both feeds full-coverage, reachable locally, no EC2 needed); spike value NO-GO as an animal kernel (forbidden by B.2 + collinear with withheld k_season + would not move L2 burstiness/single-station or L3 absent-salmon-signal). Optional low-priority L0 detector-QC covariate only; not worth a dedicated build wave.
